{{Quote|The Jundland Wastes are not to be traveled lightly.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref>}}
'''Tusken Canyon''' was a rocky canyon located in the [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]], on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]

==Description==
The Tusken Canyon was a craggy canyon located in the [[Hubba Heights/Legends|Hubba Heights]], a mountainous area within the [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="ItWoSWR" /> It was home to [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]], the canyon had little other life, but [[Massiff/Legends|massiffs]], [[Scurrier/Legends|scurriers]] and [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragons]] were known to inhabit the canyon as well. At one point, there were even rumors that a feeding hole for the [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]] that inhabited the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Great Pit of Carkoon]] had surfaced deep in the canyon.<ref name="BH" />

==History==
Tusken Canyon was once a thriving settlement until Tusken Raiders destroyed it and closed off the area to outsiders. The ruins of the long-abandoned settlement were overlooked by [[Fort Tusken/Legends|Fort Tusken]].<ref name="Manhunt" />
[[File:TuskenCanyon-SWBH.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Jango Fett fighting in the Tusken Canyon]]

In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] traveled through the Tusken Canyon during a [[Mission to Tatooine (The Hunt)|mission]] to infiltrate [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla the Hutt's]] [[Imperial Station Bravo|palace]]. Fett had to fight many Tusken Raiders and even claimed [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounties]] for some of them, namely [[Orr Agg R'orr]], [[Grk'Urr'Akk]], [[UrrOr' Shurk]] and [[Orrh Or'Ur]]. As the bounty hunter penetrated deeper in the canyon and approached Gardulla's palace, he encountered [[Gardulla the Elder's criminal empire|Gardulla's henchmen]] who patrolled the area in [[Bantha-II cargo skiff/Legends|Bantha-II cargo skiffs]]. After defeating most of them and claiming the bounties for [[Yo-Hann Innk]], [[Oosk Kassa]], [[Drossk]], [[Linjak Mosa]], [[Keejik Ganz]] and [[Hakma Kinto]], Jango Fett arrived at the palace and was able to successfully enter the building. The bounty hunter then confronted the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] for her association with the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]].<ref name="BH" />

In the days prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] caught the fleeing droid [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] in the Tusken Canyon after the latter escaped from the [[Lars homestead/Legends|Lars homestead]].<ref name="ANH" /><ref name="CCG">{{CCG|set=Official Tournament Sealed Deck|cardname=Tatooine: Tusken Canyon}}</ref> They were then attacked by Tusken Raiders but were soon rescued by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]<ref name="ANH" /> who had his [[Ben Kenobi's home/Legends|home]] in the neighborhood.<ref name="ItWoSWR" /> A short time later, a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operatives visited the Tusken Canyon during their [[Escape from Tatooine|mission]] to evacuate [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]] from Tatooine.<ref name="Manhunt" />
